recommendations.action: Reclassify this fixture to FM-24-only in queue metadata; keep FM-25 mapped to worker fixtures (`worker_safety_finish`, `worker_empty_response`, `worker_max_tokens_truncated`).

resolution.evidence: Queue entry still infers both FM-24 and FM-25 (`rlm_adk_docs/FMEA/fmea_gaps_020326.json:4661`), while fixture has only reasoning caller and no worker call (`tests_rlm_adk/fixtures/provider_fake/reasoning_safety_finish.json:14`).
